programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jalen Hurts lets it fly as A.J. Brown and DeVonta Smith combine for 304 yards and 3 touchdowns as the Eagles outscore a Carson Wentz-led Vikings team 28-22.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Seattle Seahawks wide receiver Rashid Shaheed returned the opening kickoff for a touchdown, Kenneth Walker III rushed for three scores and the Seahawks advanced to the NFC championship game with a dominant 41-6 victory over the San Francisco 49ers.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Pittsburgh Steelers harassed the Indianapolis Colts into 6 turnovers for a 27-20 victory on Sunday that provided a reminder that when at its best, Pittsburgh's star-laden defense can create a unique brand of chaos.

programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the sixth hole, a dogleg par 4, at a hilltop course in Lisbon, Portugal, at Penha Longa in the Cascais area.

programme.desc: Paul and Chris play the 14th hole in Aroeira near Lisbon, Portugal, a course that Paul knows well from playing the Portuguese Open.
